name: Themis Medicare Limited
summary: Themis Medicare Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells pharmaceutical products in India and internationally. It offers active pharmaceutical ingredients and formulations for use in various therapeutic areas, such as anti-infective, antimalarial, anti-tuberculosis, cardiology, health and nutrition, oncology, ophthalmology, and pain management. The company was formerly known as Themis Chemicals and changed its name to Themis Medicare Limited in 2001. Themis Medicare Limited was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
